channel.title: News - English [KBS WORLD Radio] | International
channel.description: We provide you with the latest news from home and abroad, in addition to in-depth analysis on major issues, with a close eye on Northeast Asia and the Korean Peninsula in particular.

item.title: Trump Pauses ‘Project Freedom,’ Claims ‘Great Progress’ in Peace Talks with Iran
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says “great progress” has been made in peace negotiations with Iran and that he is temporarily halting the U.S.-led Project Freedom mission to help secure free passage for vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. On Truth Social on Tuesday, Trump said the decision was based on a ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Pauses ‘Project Freedom,’ Claims ‘Great Progress’ in Peace Talks with Iran

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Hegseth Urges S. Korea, Others to ‘Step Up’ to Help Restore Passage in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth has urged South Korea and other countries to “step up” to help restore safe passage in the Strait of Hormuz, after an explosion and subsequent fire were reported aboard a South Korean-operated cargo ship in the waterway. During a press conference at the Pentagon on ...

[more...]

image.title: Hegseth Urges S. Korea, Others to ‘Step Up’ to Help Restore Passage in Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Says Iran Attacked S. Korean Ship, Urges Seoul to Join 'Project Freedom'
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran attacked a South Korean cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz and called on South Korea to join a U.S. operation aimed at reopening the waterway. In a social media post on Monday, Trump said, "Iran has taken some shots at unrelated Nations with respect to the Ship ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Says Iran Attacked S. Korean Ship, Urges Seoul to Join 'Project Freedom'

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump: US Will Help ‘Free’ Stranded Ships from Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: U.S. President Donald Trump says the United States will help “free” ships that have been stranded in the Strait of Hormuz since the start of the war in Iran. Trump said the operation, dubbed “Project Freedom,” would start Monday. Twenty-six South Korean vessels are among the thousands of ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: US Will Help ‘Free’ Stranded Ships from Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US to Help Trapped Ships Escape Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump has promised to help "neutral and innocent" ships escape the shut down Strait of Hormuz. Trump stated on Truth Social on Sunday that the U.S. would assist vessels from countries uninvolved in the Middle East crisis, starting Monday, through an initiative called Project ...

[more...]

image.title: US to Help Trapped Ships Escape Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US Warns of Sanctions for Hormuz Transit Arrangements
item.description:
[International] :
The United States government has warned that shipping companies could face sanctions for paying Iran to secure safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz. According to the Associated Press, the U.S. Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) issued an alert Saturday cautioning that ...

[more...]

image.title: US Warns of Sanctions for Hormuz Transit Arrangements

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Iran Submits 14-Point Proposal, US Signals Skepticism
item.description:
[International] :
Amid ongoing negotiations between the United States and Iran, Tehran has reportedly presented a revised 14‑point response to Washington's proposal to end the conflict that began with U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran on February 28. According to the semi-official Tasnim news agency, which is ...

[more...]

image.title: Iran Submits 14-Point Proposal, US Signals Skepticism

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: S. Korea to Analyze Impact of US Plan to Raise EU Auto Tariffs
item.description:
[International] :
The presidential office said it will analyze the potential impact on South Korea and respond accordingly following United States President Donald Trump's announcement of a plan to raise tariffs on European Union-made passenger cars and trucks to 25 percent. An official at the top office said Saturday ...

[more...]

image.title: S. Korea to Analyze Impact of US Plan to Raise EU Auto Tariffs

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: S. Korean Tanker Again Uses Red Sea Route for Oil Transport
item.description:
[International] :
A South Korean oil tanker has taken a detour through the Red Sea for the second time since the closure of the Strait of Hormuz in mid‑April. The Ministry of Oceans and Fisheries said Sunday that as of 10 a.m., the vessel had safely passed through the Red Sea and was en route to South Korea. The ...

[more...]

image.title: S. Korean Tanker Again Uses Red Sea Route for Oil Transport

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Foreign Minister Cho Calls for Safe Passage in Hormuz in Call with Iranian Counterpart
item.description:
[International] :
Foreign Minister Cho Hyun held a phone call Saturday with Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi to discuss the situation in the Middle East, according to South Korea's Foreign Ministry. The ministry said the call was arranged at Iran's request and that the two ministers exchanged views on regional ...

[more...]

image.title: Foreign Minister Cho Calls for Safe Passage in Hormuz in Call with Iranian Counterpart

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US to Pull Approx. 5,000 Troops from Germany
item.description:
[International] :
The United States has decided to withdraw approximately five-thousand of its troops from Germany over the next six to 12 months. In a statement sent out to KBS and other media outlets on Friday, Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell said Secretary of War Pete Hegseth has ordered the troop reduction ...

[more...]

image.title: US to Pull Approx. 5,000 Troops from Germany

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Global Oil Prices Drop after Iran Makes New Proposal in Peace Talks with US
item.description:
[International] :
Global oil prices fell Friday on hopes for an end to the U.S.-Iran war after Tehran delivered a new proposal through Pakistan, though President Donald Trump said he was not satisfied with the offer. Brent crude, the international standard, for July delivery ended Friday at 108 U.S. dollars and 17 cents ...

[more...]

image.title: Global Oil Prices Drop after Iran Makes New Proposal in Peace Talks with US

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Top Office: No Discussions on US Troop Cut
item.description:
[International] :
The presidential office says there have been no discussions between Seoul and Washington on withdrawing U.S. troops stationed in South Korea, or reducing their numbers, following remarks by U.S. President Donald Trump about a possible troop cut in Germany. Presidential spokesperson Kang Yu-jung told ...

[more...]

image.title: Top Office: No Discussions on US Troop Cut

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: S. Korea, Australia Resolve to Cooperate to Maintain Supplies of Key Energy Resources
item.description:
[International] :
South Korea and Australia have agreed to work together to maintain reliable supplies of key energy resources.  According to the foreign ministry, the two countries unveiled a joint statement on energy security ahead of a meeting of their foreign ministers in Seoul on Thursday.  In the statement, the ...

[more...]

image.title: S. Korea, Australia Resolve to Cooperate to Maintain Supplies of Key Energy Resources

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Iran Warns of ‘Unprecedented Action’ against U.S. Naval Blockade
item.description:
[International] :
Iran’s armed forces have vowed to take “practical and unprecedented action” against the continued U.S. naval blockade of its ports, defining it as “maritime piracy and banditry.” Iran’s Press TV on Wednesday cited an anonymous high-ranking security source as saying patience has limits and that a ...

[more...]

image.title: Iran Warns of ‘Unprecedented Action’ against U.S. Naval Blockade

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Reports: Trump Wants to Extend Blockade on Iran
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: U.S. President Donald Trump has reportedly ordered his aides to prepare for an extension of the Strait of Hormuz blockade, rejecting a deal with Iran. As his critics raise concerns about the ongoing conflict, U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth slammed detractors, labeling lawmakers who oppose the ...

[more...]

image.title: Reports: Trump Wants to Extend Blockade on Iran

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Hegseth Calls N. Korean Missile Program ‘Lesson’ for Lawmakers
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth compared Iran's nuclear ambitions to those of North Korea and characterized Pyongyang's missile program as a "lesson" in an effort to justify the war in Iran. Hegseth told a House Armed Services Committee hearing on Wednesday that Tehran's nuclear ambitions had continued ...

[more...]

image.title: Hegseth Calls N. Korean Missile Program ‘Lesson’ for Lawmakers

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Korean Nat'l Police Agency to Expand Korea Desk in Cambodia
item.description:
[International] :
The Korean National Police Agency(KNPA) has decided to expand a South Korea-Cambodia joint task force on eradicating crimes targeting Korean nationals by criminal organizations based in the Southeast Asian country. The decision was reached during a meeting in Seoul on Wednesday between the national police ...

[more...]

image.title: Korean Nat'l Police Agency to Expand Korea Desk in Cambodia

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: WSJ: Trump Tells Aides to Prepare for Extended Blockade of Iran
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump has reportedly instructed his aides to prepare for a prolonged blockade of Iran to pressure it into abandoning its nuclear program. The Wall Street Journal issued the report on Tuesday, quoting several officials as saying that Trump opted to continue squeezing Iran’s economy ...

[more...]

image.title: WSJ: Trump Tells Aides to Prepare for Extended Blockade of Iran

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: UAE to Withdraw from OPEC May 1
item.description:
[International] :
The United Arab Emirates(UAE) will withdraw from the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries(OPEC) and the wider OPEC+, which includes Russia and other allies, after nearly 60 years of membership. In a statement carried by the state-run WAM news agency on Tuesday, the UAE said the decision to ...

[more...]

image.title: UAE to Withdraw from OPEC May 1

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Pakistan Lifts Restrictions around Islamabad’s Red Zone, Peace Negotiation Venue
item.description:
[International] :
Pakistan, which has been mediating peace talks between the United States and Iran, has lifted traffic and security restrictions around the negotiation venue after more than a week. In a social media post on Monday, Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar said traffic control ...

[more...]

image.title: Pakistan Lifts Restrictions around Islamabad’s Red Zone, Peace Negotiation Venue

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Suspected Shooter at White House Correspondents’ Dinner to Be Charged Monday
item.description:
[International] :
An armed man who was stopped from storming into a White House Correspondents’ Dinner event on Saturday after exchanging fire with law enforcement has been placed in custody and is expected to be formally charged in federal court on Monday. According to U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine ...

[more...]

image.title: Suspected Shooter at White House Correspondents’ Dinner to Be Charged Monday

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: N. Korean Leader, Russian Defense Chief Discuss Military Cooperation
item.description:
[International] :
North Korean leader Kim Jong-un met with visiting Russian Defense Minister Andrei Belousov in Pyongyang on Sunday to discuss bilateral military cooperation. According to Russia's state media, Belousov said his country was prepared to sign a mutual military cooperation plan with the North for the years 2027 ...

[more...]

image.title: N. Korean Leader, Russian Defense Chief Discuss Military Cooperation

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Cancels US Envoys' Trip to Pakistan for Talks on Iran War
item.description:
[International] :
A second round of peace talks between the United States and Iran, expected to take place in Pakistan this weekend, has effectively collapsed after Washington canceled its delegation's visit. U.S. President Donald Trump said Saturday that he canceled a planned trip by U.S. officials to Pakistan for ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Cancels US Envoys' Trip to Pakistan for Talks on Iran War

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Evacuated After Shots Fired at White House Correspondents' Dinner
item.description:
[International] :
Gunfire reportedly broke out in the hotel hosting the White House Correspondents' Dinner on Saturday, leading to the evacuation of United States President Donald Trump. The incident occurred around 8 p.m. at the Washington Hilton in Washington, D.C., where the annual dinner organized by the White ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Evacuated After Shots Fired at White House Correspondents' Dinner

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Second Oil Tanker Arrives in Iraq's Basra Port amid Iran's Closure of Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
A second oil tanker has arrived at an offshore oil loading terminal in Iraq's southern Basra port on Friday since Iran effectively shut down the Strait of Hormuz following the outbreak of a war with the United States and Israel in late February. According to Reuters, the Comoros-flagged supertanker ...

[more...]

image.title: Second Oil Tanker Arrives in Iraq's Basra Port amid Iran's Closure of Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Korean Studies Center to Open at University of Oxford as Early as October
item.description:
[International] :
A center dedicated to Korean studies is set to open at the University of Oxford as early as October. The university is expected to announce the launch of the Oxford Centre for Korean Studies, during a ceremony to mark the opening of the Stephen A. Schwarzman Centre for the Humanities on Saturday. The ...

[more...]

image.title: Korean Studies Center to Open at University of Oxford as Early as October

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Senior Officials from S. Korea, US Meet amid Intel Restriction Controversy
item.description:
[International] :
Senior diplomatic officials from South Korea and the United States held talks amid controversy over Washington's reported restriction of Seoul's intelligence access following Unification Minister Chung Dong-young's disclosure of one of North Korea's nuclear facilities. Vice Foreign Minister for Strategy and ...

[more...]

image.title: Senior Officials from S. Korea, US Meet amid Intel Restriction Controversy

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Envoys from US, Iran Begin to Arrive in Pakistan, Raising Speculation for Peace Talk Resumption
item.description:
[International] :
Envoys from both the United States and Iran have begun to arrive in Pakistan, raising speculation that the two sides may resume a second round of peace talks. White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said on Friday that U.S. President Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner and Special Envoy ...

[more...]

image.title: Envoys from US, Iran Begin to Arrive in Pakistan, Raising Speculation for Peace Talk Resumption

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Coupang Discloses US Lobbying Involving White House, Congress
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. lobbying reports show that e-commerce giant Coupang Inc. spent over one million dollars in the first quarter of this year on lobbying activities involving the White House, Congress and other government agencies, following its massive data leak in South Korea in November of last year. According to the ...

[more...]

image.title: Coupang Discloses US Lobbying Involving White House, Congress

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio
